name: Crispy Rattlesnake Coils
recipeIngredient: 1 Rattlesnake, cut into strips (about 8 inches long and 1/4 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rattlesnake into 8-inch-long strips, about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Season the strips with salt and pepper.
3. Place flour in a container that can be covered. Add the rattlesnake strips and shake to coat evenly.
4. Refrigerate for about two hours to allow the flour to become sticky while the Crisco heats in a deep fryer.
5. Remove from the refrigerator, re-season with salt and pepper if desired, and add more flour as needed.
6. When the Crisco shortening is hot enough, carefully lower the rattlesnake strips into the grease so they are fully covered.
7. Fry until golden brown. Transfer to a container prewarmed in the oven.
8. Continue frying the remaining strips.
9. Serve on a basket lined with a cloth napkin.
Note: The fried rattlesnake strips will appear coiled!
Serving Suggestion: Cover the basket with the napkin for serving.
